experiments.purpose: Make `Span` a typealias to Swift.Span and `Span.Mutable` a typealias to Swift.MutableSpan, re-hosting the span-vending capability protocols; resolve the Swift.Span namespace collision while keeping bare spellings (unbound-alias + member-typealias hosting).
experiments.statusDetail: (best-of-all-worlds: Span<E>=Swift.Span<E>, Span.Mutable<E>=Swift.MutableSpan<E>, plus bare Span.Protocol / Span.Mutable.Protocol / Span.Raw — via UNBOUND `typealias Span = Swift.Span` + Element-free member typealiases on Swift.Span and Swift.MutableSpan; cross-module + release. A BOUND `Span<E>` alias does NOT preserve the bare spelling — Counterexample 03. No ecosystem rename; 110 conformer sites untouched.)

experiments.purpose: [EXP-017] soundness spike for the mutable linchpin: a bare Swift.MutableSpan vending itself as a mutable-span provider. The naive `{ self }` consumes self (REFUTED); the non-consuming `extracting(...)` aliases backing storage soundly, cross-module, debug + release (CONFIRMED). Generic forwarding of the var form hits the pre-existing no-generic-mutableSpan gate (orthogonal).
experiments.statusDetail: (concrete self-vend sound via extracting(...); ~Escapable restatement makes no owner ~Escapable; gate passed for concrete use; borrow/mutate-accessor V3 deferred pending SE-0507 toolchain)
